title: Run reconcile from git hooks after pull/rebase/checkout
description: Update overlay hook installer so post-merge/post-rewrite/post-checkout run reconcile+gc, ensuring stale overrides are pruned on remote sync.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Hook installer now writes reconcile+gc commands for post-merge/post-checkout/post-rewrite and includes guardrails for disabled hooksPath. Evidence: hook block updated to run  before ; install now returns explicit message when core.hooksPath=/dev/null. Next: close task after docs/test updates are merged. Risk/Blocker: local repo currently has core.hooksPath=/dev/null so hook installation is intentionally blocked until unset.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Hook maintenance logic now targets reconcile+gc and reports disabled hooksPath clearly. Evidence: hook block includes  before ; installer returns explicit guidance when . Next: enable hooks in target repos by unsetting core.hooksPath, then run install-hooks. Risk/Blocker: current repo keeps hooks disabled by configuration.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Hook maintenance logic now targets reconcile plus gc and reports disabled hooksPath clearly.
Evidence: Hook block includes overlay reconcile all prune before overlay gc all; installer now reports explicit guidance when core hooksPath points to dev null.
Next: Enable hooks in target repos by unsetting hooksPath, then run install-hooks.
Risk/Blocker: current repo keeps hooks disabled by configuration.
